title: Papercraft Layered Hero Poster AI
sourceTitle: Papercraft Layered Hero Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-detailed 3D layered papercraft adventure poster, original ocean rider hero emerging from intricate paper-cut waves and swirling clouds. The hero wears a teal jacket and red scarf, holds a paper compass, and leaps forward in a bold action pose. Multi-layer shadow box design, handcrafted paper sculpture aesthetic, deep dimensional cut-paper artwork, crisp layered cardstock textures, Japanese-inspired wave patterns, ornamental cloud motifs, floating paper fragments, cinematic lighting, high depth and relief, vibrant hero colors contrasting against elegant white paper background. Embossed title at the bottom reading "TIDE RUNNER" in clean paper-cut lettering. Premium collectible poster design, intricate laser-cut details, fantasy adventure theme, sharp focus, clean composition. No copied anime IP, no logo, no watermark, no random text. hero: original ocean rider hero in teal jacket, red scarf, holding a paper compass, leaping from waves. paper environment: intricate paper-cut waves, swirling clouds, floating white fragments, deep shadow box layers. composition: vertical poster, dramatic low angle, hero emerging from white layered paper.
imagePrompts.title: Papercraft Ocean Rider Hero

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-detailed 3D layered papercraft fantasy poster, original cloud archer heroine emerging from intricate paper-cut clouds, cranes, mountain cutouts, and wind ribbons. The heroine wears a saffron cloak and indigo boots, drawing a paper bow in a dynamic diagonal action pose. Multi-layer shadow box design, handcrafted paper sculpture aesthetic, deep dimensional cut-paper artwork, crisp layered cardstock textures, ornamental cloud motifs, floating paper fragments, cinematic lighting, high depth and relief, vibrant character colors contrasting against elegant white paper background. Embossed title at the bottom reading "SKY ARROW" in clean paper-cut lettering. Premium collectible poster design, intricate laser-cut details, fantasy adventure theme, sharp focus, clean composition. No copied anime IP, no logo, no watermark, no random text. hero: original cloud archer heroine in saffron cloak and indigo boots, drawing a paper bow. paper environment: layered clouds, cranes, mountain cutouts, wind ribbons, white cardstock relief. composition: vertical poster, central diagonal action pose, deep relief on white paper.
